---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the Codex LAM template or operating model
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should Codex LAM help users do better?

## Current Friction

Where does the current template, workflow, or documentation fall short?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Review Notes

- Does this affect `AGENTS.md`, `.codex/`, `.agents/skills/`, or `docs/internal/`?
- Does this require a requirements, design, or task update?
